name: Setmore
description: Setmore — Free appointment scheduling software with REST API for embedding booking into websites and applications.

seo.title: Setmore — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Setmore: Setmore — Free appointment scheduling software with REST API for embedding booking into websites and applications.

when_to_use: Free booking widget for service business website
REST API for embedding booking into custom application
Multi-staff availability management via scheduling API
Webhook integration for post-booking notification flows
Appointment management for fitness studios and salons

cons: UI feels dated compared to rivals
review.verdict: Functional free scheduler for micro-businesses, though Calendly and SavvyCal feel more modern for teams.
review.best_for: Micro-businesses embedding free booking into sites
review.not_for: Developer-focused teams wanting a polished API UX

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
